name: Stuffed Bell Peppers with Italian Seasonings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook the tomatoes in the oil over medium-high heat for 5 to 10 minutes. Add the remaining sauce ingredients and cook 20 to 25 minutes over medium heat. The sauce should be boiling slightly.
2. Mix the stuffing ingredients together with 1 cup of the cooled sauce in a large bowl.
3. Stuff the prepared peppers with the mixture.
4. Place the stuffed peppers in a deep pan with the remaining sauce on top. Cover with aluminum foil and bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until the peppers are tender.
